name: create-teams-types
acceptanceCriteria: types.ts exports ITeamsService interface with no runtime imports
Defines Organization, Team, OrganizationMember, TeamMember, Invitation, Permission types

Defines ITeamsService methods: createOrg, getOrg, updateOrg, listUserOrgs, createTeam, getTeam, updateTeam, listOrgTeams, addOrgMember, removeOrgMember, updateMemberRole, addTeamMember, removeTeamMember, createInvitation, acceptInvitation, revokeInvitation, getPermission, setPermission
